allow: PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 58741,58742,58743 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress, LocalPort, OwningProcess, @{Name="Process";Expression={\(Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).ProcessName}} | Format-Table -AutoSize)
PowerShell(Get-Command claude, npx, node, gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell($pluginsPath = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Roblox\\Plugins"; "Path: $pluginsPath"; "Exists: $\(Test-Path $pluginsPath\)"; if \(Test-Path $pluginsPath\) { Get-ChildItem $pluginsPath | Select-Object Name, Length, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize })

PowerShell($node15980 = Get-Process -Id 15980 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $node26200 = Get-Process -Id 26200 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "PID 15980 \(port 58742\): $\($node15980.Path\)"; "PID 26200 \(port 58741\): $\($node26200.Path\)"; "---"; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId = 15980 OR ProcessId = 26200" | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine | Format-List)

PowerShell($h = @{ "User-Agent" = "claude-setup" }; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/boshyxd/robloxstudio-mcp/releases/latest" -Headers $h; "Tag: $\($r.tag_name\)"; "Published: $\($r.published_at\)"; "---Assets---"; $r.assets | Select-Object name, size, browser_download_url | Format-List)

permissions: PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -in 58740,58741,58742,58743,58744,58745,3002 } | Select-Object LocalAddress,LocalPort,OwningProcess | Format-Table)
PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=27552 OR ProcessId=46920 OR ProcessId=30332")
PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=7792 OR ProcessId=32040 OR ProcessId=26316")

PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 46920,27552 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -in 58741,58742,58743,58744 } | Select-Object LocalPort,OwningProcess | Format-Table)
PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -in 58740..58750 } | Select-Object LocalPort,OwningProcess | Sort-Object LocalPort | Format-Table)

PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=46916 OR ProcessId=31516" | ForEach-Object { $pp = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$\($_.ParentProcessId\)"; [PSCustomObject]@{CmdPID=$_.ProcessId; GrandparentPID=$pp.ProcessId; GrandparentName=$pp.Name; GrandparentCmd=$pp.CommandLine} } | Format-List)

PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=27536 OR ProcessId=26432" | ForEach-Object { $pp = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$\($_.ParentProcessId\)"; [PSCustomObject]@{NpxPID=$_.ProcessId; ParentPID=$pp.ProcessId; ParentName=$pp.Name; ParentCmd=\($pp.CommandLine | ForEach-Object { if\($_\){$_.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(200,$_.Length\)\)} }\) } } | Format-List)
